final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic movie poster for the film "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography with heavy film grain, 90s Hong Kong wuxia romance aesthetic, reminiscent of Wong Kar-wai and Ching Siu-tung's visual language
Composition: wide establishing shot, medium distance, slightly elevated angle overlooking the ancient city wall, three-layer depth of field
Subject: central focus on 至尊宝 (Zhi Zunbao) and 紫霞 (Zixia) in an emotional embrace and kiss on the ancient city wall, both in traditional wuxia costume
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese fortress wall at dusk, distant silhouette of 牛魔王 (Bull Demon King) and 唐僧 (Tang Seng) standing apart in the background, dramatic sky
Lighting/mood: golden hour transitioning to twilight, soft diffused backlight creating romantic silhouette effect, melancholic and epic atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and burnt orange dominant, muted teal shadows, subtle magenta accents from sunset
Materials/textures: visible 35mm film grain throughout, slightly soft focus on background figures, authentic period costume fabrics
Text (verbatim): "大话西游"
Constraints: must evoke 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster design language, film grain must be organic not digital noise
Avoid: modern digital clean look, oversaturated colors, anime style, deformed hands, plastic skin, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
